profilePicture.title: Profile Picture
profilePicture.description: Your profile picture is visible to all team members across all businesses you belong to.
profilePicture.hint: PNG or JPG, max 2MB. Square images work best.
profilePicture.sharedInfo: Your profile picture is shared across all businesses you are a member of.

password.title: Password
password.description: To change your password, we'll send a reset link to your email.
password.emailSent: Reset link sent! Check your inbox.
password.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
password.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for your dashboard and email communications.
